title: Fermented Croatian Pastry Bites
description: Crispy, cheesy-free pastry bites filled with a tangy, fermented filling.
instructions: Roll out the pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out small squares of pastry dough, about 2 inches per side.
In a small bowl, mix together the fermented cheese alternative, parsley, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Place a small spoonful of the cheese mixture in the center of each pastry square.
Fold the pastry squares in half to form triangles, pressing the edges together to seal.
Place the pastry bites on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
If using, sprinkle with indulgent chocolate chips and return to the oven for an additional 2-3 minutes.
